notes: Ran the repository-local Demucs/librosa audio analysis against the provided Goodbye MP3 and captured a reusable summary in the run directory.
Updated the existing Goodbye songs entry so its source, summary, meter, and chart notes reflect the full-track MP3 validation pass.
Published a draft lead-sheet markdown file using the current practical chart rather than exposing raw MIR bars.
Added a section-by-section comparison against a musically cleaned 7th-aware candidate chart.
open_issues: The draft lead sheet is still not human-approved bar-by-bar.
Some middle-section MIR labels leaned toward suspended or altered dominant spellings and were not promoted into the practical chart.
The 7th-aware column is theory-guided and still needs human listening if publication-grade voicing detail matters.
